Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.other_fuel.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.district_cooling.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 AND coalesce(abs(up."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh" - bs."out.district_heating.total.energy_consumption..kwh"), 0) < 0.001 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/000facc4936f229bddd173bf282eac5e0db5b13f0e87f54389b35c7a93fa17f9/2c4fb155-4a24-4c69-a4db-eb8aa8d37b0f/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
